prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild dormitory, Emi Serene in cream and mint robes and Haru Mistfell in a tool-belt apron are standing at a workbench; Emi extends her hands to cast a soft, glowing healing aura while Haru carefully stabilizes a flickering, unstable mana crystal with brass tools, cinematic lighting, focused expressions, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot; Haru secures the mana crystal with a final adjustment while Emi gently places her hand over the crystal to channel her aura, the flickering light stabilizes into a steady, warm glow, they share a brief, relieved nod of successful cooperation, consistent camera and character appearance, no text, no watermark.
